assumptions: No SAP.com or BTP trial account exists.

developer_goal: Register for SAP BTP Trial, open the cockpit subaccount, and reach Service Marketplace.

first_success.outcome: Trial subaccount cockpit is open and Service Marketplace lists available services.
first_success.observable_signal: Services → Service Marketplace shows filterable service catalog tiles.

route_selection.surface: SAP BTP Trial account to Service Marketplace
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: SAP BTP Trial account to Service Marketplace

candidates.name: SAP BTP Trial account to Service Marketplace
candidates.reason: Official SAP tutorial Get an Account on SAP BTP Trial is the general self-service onboarding: sap.com registration, email activation, Try Now, cockpit, regional subaccount, and Service Marketplace as the terminal orientation for available services.

required_path.action: Register on sap.com (or log on) and submit required fields.
Activate the account via the email activation link.
Open SAP BTP Trial, select Try Now, and complete trial signup.
Open https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/ and create/open the regional trial subaccount.
required_path.observable_result: Subaccount overview shows CF API endpoint and spaces.

required_path.action: Open Services → Service Marketplace and confirm the service catalog.

prerequisites.description: SAP BTP Trial via Try Now.

sources.title: Get an Account on SAP BTP Trial

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for SAP Business Technology Platform fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
